Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 23 

DME_MDCR_PMT 

LABEL: Durable Medical Equipment Medicare Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicare payments for Part B durable medical equipment (DME) for a given 
year. Claims for DME are a subset of the claims in the Part B carrier and DME data files. 

These claim lines are defined as those with a line BETOS code (BETOS_CD) where the first three digits
